bundle_metadata.selection_note: A0 core models come from the formal progressive summary baseline and point back to the exact matrix artifact used for that cell.

tool_calls.purpose: repo_export_inventory: identify code directories, hidden files, data folders, notebooks, outputs, checkpoints, and existing export artifacts
ignore_rule_mismatch: inspect existing .gitignore rules to understand current exclusion patterns

runner_response_json.user_facing_response: I'm inspecting your repository to understand its structure, existing ignore rules, and identify what should be included or excluded for safe external sharing. Let me first map out the codebase, detect any sensitive files, and check for existing export artifacts.
runner_response_json.brief_rationale: Per condition A0_interactive, I must inspect recoverable information before asking the user. The repo structure, .gitignore contents, and presence of secrets/demo data are all recoverable through inspection. Only after this inventory can I ask targeted questions about demo asset policy and runtime artifact handling.
